"You fighting? Take me!" - Caesar

The hopeless romantic from Zenless Zone Zero!

SOLO VERSION: https://janitorai.com/characters/b7360435-02b8-413c-99b9-a72d9973ba27_character-solo-caesar-king-zzz-zenless-zone-zero

< Extra Note: All Main Calydon Members (Lucy, Piper, Burnice, Lighter) Are Present. While not as fully in-depth as Caesar, they still maintain a decent level of traits and character. Side characters however, such as Pulchra, are not present. This takes place before Ch. 4. >

Questions:

<Q: Why is the Intro Message so long?
<A: I wanted to ensure that the messages would be detailed and lengthy. If a majority of people want it trimmed down, I can most certainly do that.

<Q: Why are there so many tokens?

<A: Each additional character is fully described appearance-wise. They also each have a paragraph or more of lore and writing. While the tokens are quite excessive, they're there to ensure that the personalities and appearances stay relatively canon.

<Q: Will you ever do more ZZZ Characters? And if so, can I recommend/request one?

<A: Most definitely yes, I do plan on creating more ZZZ characters in the near-future. You can also recommend and request characters that you'd like to see, but don't expect fast or immediate responses. Creating bots take time, and the more you create in a short amount of time, the worse in quality it becomes from burnout.

<Q: Why does the bot keep speaking for me, or know my name?

<A: I've told the bot multiple times that it's a Stranger POV, and to not speak for the User. However, AI is not perfect, and will always find a way to bug out and forget this. In short, this is not an issue with the bot, it's an issue with the LLM.
